description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the erlang:19.3 Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt, installs g++-4.9, and sets CXX to g++-4.9. Define a single test job (default stage) that runs the shell command 'make test cover'. Configure the job to cache the directories _build/default/lib/rocksdb and _build/test/lib/rocksdb, and always publish the artifacts from _build/test/logs and _build/test/cover. No additional services or variables are needed.
